title: Big Tech crash, oil volatility rattles markets: Will Bitcoin hold above $60K?
summary: With $1.9 billion exiting the spot Bitcoin ETFs and tech stocks under pressure, BTC is failing as a hedge and at risk of falling below the $60,000 support.

title: Citi launches blockchain marketplace for private companies shares: Report
summary: The US banking giant's blockchain marketplace will offer tokenized depositary receipts of private company shares amid Wall Street's broad embrace of tokenized assets.

title: Stocks Gain as Trump Signals Iran Deal, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian stocks rose, tracking a rally on Wall Street after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising hopes for a diplomatic end to the conflict. Oil dropped.

title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says Deal With Iran Is Close
summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.

title: OpenAI Wants a Price War With Anthropic—Is It Proving DeepSeek Right?
summary: Sam Altman is weighing drastic token price cuts to fight Anthropic. The problem is DeepSeek already made that argument for him—and for free.

title: Bitcoin Must Prepare for Quantum Threat Now, Coinbase Says
summary: Coinbase's quantum advisory council says crypto developers should begin post-quantum migration work now, warning that unresolved questions around abandoned and vulnerable coins could become one of Bitcoin's biggest battles.

title: ‘Anarchistic neobanks’ are bitcoin’s next frontier, says Blockrise CEO
summary: Blockrise CEO Jos Lazet sees bitcoin-native institutions evolving into alternatives to banks, in an interview at BTC Prague.

title: Man who spent 1,500 BTC on graphics card now helps insure bitcoin holders
summary: Bitsurance, insures clients' bitcoin against "physical attacks" like fire, water, robbery and the "$5 Wrench Attack."
